summary: Testing of Finanzas Dashboard KPIs feature completed. All 7 backend tests passed (100%). All 7 KPI cards verified in frontend with correct data-testid attributes. KPIs are correctly global (don't change with periodo filter).

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - existing issue, non-blocking

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 7 KPI cards verified, tabs working, periodo selector working)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing orders in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Finanzas KPIs feature fully tested. KPIs are GLOBAL and don't change with periodo selector. 7 KPI metrics verified: ordenes_totales, ordenes_enviadas, ordenes_pendientes, valor_enviadas, valor_pendientes, coste_promedio_orden, ticket_medio.
verified_features: GET /api/finanzas/dashboard returns kpis_ordenes section with all 7 metrics
ordenes_totales: Total count of all orders (6)
ordenes_pendientes: Count of pending orders not shipped/cancelled (4)
valor_enviadas: Total presupuesto_total of shipped orders (229.89€)
valor_pendientes: Total presupuesto_total of pending orders (0.00€)
KPIs are GLOBAL - same values across all periodo options (dia, semana, mes, trimestre, año)
Division by zero handled correctly (returns 0 instead of error)
Frontend shows 7 KPI cards with correct data-testid attributes
Existing dashboard functionality (tabs, periodo filter, ingresos, gastos, inventario) works correctly
All 6 tabs functional: Resumen, Facturas, Cobros y Pagos, Gastos, Inventario, Evolución
Periodo selector works with 5 options: Hoy, Esta semana, Este mes, Trimestre, Este año
